title: Surgeon Vacancy at Wockhardt Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Wockhardt Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wockhardt Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wockhardt Hospitals:
Wockhardt Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals!
